reviews.review_description: please bring back the game i wanna test it out and it looks really fun you should bring back the game

reviews.review_title: Reminds me of good horror games
reviews.review_description: love the game i hope they come back to work on it
Its cheaply made and once you find the night vishon gogles or sombody gives them to you you ar all set dont metion that they took the og bags from ac its ok
it was so fun but then they had to stop it
Alot of people are hateing when their self cant make a game but sad the game is discontinued

No hate by any means. I feel like the devs put minimum work in this game, using monster sounds that have already been used am really bland￼. The game also feels rushed having very open spaces and bad game items. Again I do not condone any hate towards the game, I think they could do way more.

developer_response.body: Hey thanks for this i just got back to working on this game

reviews.review_description: Amazing game fun filled packed game great moderation can’t wait for future updates
This game is good bro Just don’t stop and keep trying

developer_response.body: Thanks bro i really appreciate this review theres gonna be a BIG UPDATE TOMORROW!

reviews.review_title: This game is super duper fun
reviews.review_description: You really have to play this game every day your can do quests by doing what it ask and then you claim your currency you get 600 trash bags every day by doing those quest so go download fc and enjoy
Now the game has been out for only a week so there might be a few things not working, but the devs are really active and are prob alredy working on a bug fix
I love this game, but if you're getting this game here's one thing you need to know it's a new game and it's still buggy.
Good but needs to fix night vision goggles

developer_response.body: They will be fixed Next update witch is tomorrow

reviews.review_description: Fallout company is a great horror game already and it has been out for a couple of hours the game is so fun and more coming soon. Get this game and have fun!!

If you like horror and hanging out with friends this game is super good
The dev and owner is really nice
WORLDS BEST GAME!

reviews.review_title: This game is very good if u like horror
reviews.review_description: ive played this game for 25miniutes and Its very good i highly recommend it if you wanna have a good horror experience with scary monsters that vibreated my headset (idk if it should do that) but it brings u more into the experience of the game and yes it does have a few glitches but what about it? its in early access and its gonna be way better in the future plsay this game if u like scary games (highly recommended Need to play as a horror fan) but would also recommend if u like hanging out and get friends!

I love the game i would love to help make cosmetics or even gadgets It's a really
 good game I love it!
